'''bobasaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:zigguratic|zigguratic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-b-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zigguratic|zigguratic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| bobasaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bobasithi|bobasithi]] || [[word:bobasiji|bobasiji]] || [[word:bobasishi|bobasishi]] || [[word:bobasiki|bobasiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bobasuthuthu|bobasuthuthu]] || [[word:bobasujuju|bobasujuju]] || [[word:bobasushushu|bobasushushu]] || [[word:bobasukuku|bobasukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bobasuthu|bobasuthu]] || [[word:bobasuju|bobasuju]] || [[word:bobasushu|bobasushu]] || [[word:bobasuku|bobasuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bobasufthuf|bobasufthuf]] || [[word:bobasufjuf|bobasufjuf]] || [[word:bobasufshuf|bobasufshuf]] || [[word:bobasufkuf|bobasufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bobasethe|bobasethe]] || [[word:bobaseje|bobaseje]] || [[word:bobaseshe|bobaseshe]] || [[word:bobaseke|bobaseke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bobasothotho|bobasothotho]] || [[word:bobasojojo|bobasojojo]] || [[word:bobasoshosho|bobasoshosho]] || [[word:bobasokoko|bobasokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bobasotho|bobasotho]] || [[word:bobasojo|bobasojo]] || [[word:bobasosho|bobasosho]] || [[word:bobasoko|bobasoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bobasofthof|bobasofthof]] || [[word:bobasofjof|bobasofjof]] || [[word:bobasofshof|bobasofshof]] || [[word:bobasofkof|bobasofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:bobasÃŸfthÃŸf|bobasÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bobasÃŸfjÃŸf|bobasÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bobasÃŸfshÃŸf|bobasÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bobasÃŸfkÃŸf|bobasÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:bobasÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|bobasÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bobasÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|bobasÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bobasÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|bobasÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bobasÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|bobasÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:bobasÃŸfthÃŸf|bobasÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bobasÃŸfjÃŸf|bobasÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bobasÃŸfshÃŸf|bobasÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bobasÃŸfkÃŸf|bobasÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:bobasÃŸfthÃŸf|bobasÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bobasÃŸfjÃŸf|bobasÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bobasÃŸfshÃŸf|bobasÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bobasÃŸfkÃŸf|bobasÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bobasÃḊthÃḊ|bobasÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:bobasÃḊjÃḊ|bobasÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:bobasÃḊshÃḊ|bobasÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:bobasÃḊkÃḊ|bobasÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bobasathatha|bobasathatha]] || [[word:bobasajaja|bobasajaja]] || [[word:bobasashasha|bobasashasha]] || [[word:bobasakaka|bobasakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bobasatha|bobasatha]] || [[word:bobasaja|bobasaja]] || [[word:bobasasha|bobasasha]] || [[word:bobasaka|bobasaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bobasafthaf|bobasafthaf]] || [[word:bobasafjaf|bobasafjaf]] || [[word:bobasafshaf|bobasafshaf]] || [[word:bobasafkaf|bobasafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:bobasasha|bobasasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:bobashÃḋsha|bobashÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bobasrosha|bobasrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bobasmusha|bobasmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:bobasyasha|bobasyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobobasnkshÃḋsha|gobobasnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobobasnkrosha|gobobasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobobasnkmusha|gobobasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobobasnkyasha|gobobasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:bobabasasha|bobabasasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bobabashÃḋsha|bobabashÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bobabasrosha|bobabasrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bobabasmusha|bobabasmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bobabasyasha|bobabasyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobobabasnkshÃḋsha|gobobabasnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobobabasnkrosha|gobobabasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobobabasnkmusha|gobobabasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobobabasnkyasha|gobobabasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:bebÃḊsasha|bebÃḊsasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bebÃḊshÃḋsha|bebÃḊshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bebÃḊsrosha|bebÃḊsrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bebÃḊsmusha|bebÃḊsmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bebÃḊsyasha|bebÃḊsyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobebÃḊsnkshÃḋsha|gobebÃḊsnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobebÃḊsnkrosha|gobebÃḊsnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobebÃḊsnkmusha|gobebÃḊsnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobebÃḊsnkyasha|gobebÃḊsnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:bobfasasha|bobfasasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bobfashÃḋsha|bobfashÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bobfasrosha|bobfasrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bobfasmusha|bobfasmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bobfasyasha|bobfasyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobobfasnkshÃḋsha|gobobfasnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobobfasnkrosha|gobobfasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobobfasnkmusha|gobobfasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobobfasnkyasha|gobobfasnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
